articles.title: Spirit Airlines ceases operations after escalating financial struggles - NPR
articles.description: The low-cost carrier, which had been struggling for years, announced it will cease operations. Spirit had been seeking a $500 million lifeline from the White House, but talks failed to yield a deal.

articles.title: Clarity Act text lets crypto firms offer stablecoin rewards while shielding bank yield - CoinDesk
articles.description: The text released Friday blocks crypto firms from offering stablecoin yield offerings that look like bank deposits, but "bona fide" transactions are allowed.

articles.title: S.F. supervisors, state senator arrested as May Day protest closes SFO roadway - San Francisco Chronicle
